description: CompositionGrey and black striped shirt with white accents, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar, full front buttoned placket, full sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, buttoned pockets on either chest with red stitch detailing, and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryChecks that add immense attitude to your style is what this shirt from basics brings into your life. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve buttoned flaps to suit the occasion. Team this shirt with jeans and suede shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
